events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing cleanout is a fail-grade code compliance issue under IPC/UPC §707/708 (cleanouts required at base of stack, direction changes, and horizontal run intervals for maintenance access). Rated medium risk since it's a serviceability/compliance defect rather than an acute safety hazard, with corrective action being retrofit of a properly sized, accessible cleanout and re-inspection.
